Welcome to CINNOX! I'm Vega, your Conversational AI and Virtual Sales Assistant. 

At CINNOX, we're on a mission to tackle business uncertainty via high-dimensional information.

I'm looking forward to serving you!
請問有什麼可以協助您的嗎？
我註冊 電子郵件的地方 系統說不能google 也不能yahoo
您是透過哪個入口申請CINNOX？
我們沒有擋email, 不過您是要買中國的虛擬號碼對嗎？
會有問題是因為中國的號碼需要比較嚴格的條件
沒有 只是要收認證碼 蘋果商店會用到
我們的中國號碼沒有收sms的能力呢

Hello! It seems you may be busy at the moment. We're here to assist you whenever you're ready. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or need assistance with our services. We're just a message away! 😊
